creator: rea-fbsd@codelabs.ru
text:
There is a wonderful Trac plugin that adds fancy date fields to the
core UI [1].

Fix: The following shar(1) archive contains the new port.  It was tested
in the real life and it passes Tinderbox builds on 7.x, 8.x and 9.x.
How-To-Repeat: 
[1] http://trac-hacks.org/wiki/DateFieldPlugin
